step_9_mirror_of_self.test: Each cycle 7 filing names the reciprocal echo channel using only third-party correspondence (attorney letters citing Bantjies; Bantjies instructions citing attorney letters). No allegation in Pillar XV depends on inference; each is documentary.
step_9_mirror_of_self.verdict: Pillar XV stands as living truth — the structure preserves the existing case while making explicit a relation that was previously latent.

weakest_quality_for_cycle8.name: Good_Shape
weakest_quality_for_cycle8.rationale: Internal coherence of each filing — opportunity to harmonize length, tone, paragraph numbering across all 8 forums.
